originContent: # yt-dlp-rajiko
translatedContent: # yt-dlp-rajiko

originContent: improved [radiko.jp](https://radiko.jp) extractor plugin for yt-dlp (fast and areafree)
translatedContent: improved [radiko.jp](https://radiko.jp) extractor plugin for yt-dlp (fast and areafree)

originContent: yt-dlp-rajiko lets you download Japanese radio shows from radiko.jp without a VPN, using yt-dlp.
translatedContent: yt-dlp-rajiko lets you download Japanese radio shows from radiko.jp without a VPN, using yt-dlp.

originContent: It downloads quickly, and works for any participating station*, from anywhere in the world.
translatedContent: It downloads quickly, and works for any participating station*, from anywhere in the world.

originContent: *except NHK, but they have their own site which is supported
translatedContent: *except NHK, but they have their own site which is supported

originContent: in yt-dlp proper
translatedContent: in yt-dlp proper

originContent: Intended for personal archiving, not for commercial use. Please subscribe to radiko Premium if you are able.
translatedContent: Intended for personal archiving, not for commercial use. Please subscribe to radiko Premium if you are able.

originContent: (It's Free Software, so this is just me asking nicely, not a hard requirement. but you should do it so that radiko can keep existing)
translatedContent: (It's Free Software, so this is just me asking nicely, not a hard requirement. but you should do it so that radiko can keep existing)

originContent: (also, if you get the timefree30 plan you can use it with yt-dlp :P)
translatedContent: (also, if you get the timefree30 plan you can use it with yt-dlp :P)

originContent: ### [日本語  🇯🇵](https://427738.xyz/yt-dlp-rajiko/index.ja.html)
translatedContent: ### [日本語  🇯🇵](https://427738.xyz/yt-dlp-rajiko/index.ja.html)

originContent: ## Installation
translatedContent: ## Installation

originContent: [Download the plugin bundle](https://427738.xyz/yt-dlp-rajiko/dl/yt_dlp_rajiko-latest.bundle.zip) or `pip install yt-dlp-rajiko`
translatedContent: [Download the plugin bundle](https://427738.xyz/yt-dlp-rajiko/dl/yt_dlp_rajiko-latest.bundle.zip) or `pip install yt-dlp-rajiko`

originContent: Requires yt-dlp 2025.02.19 or newer.
translatedContent: Requires yt-dlp 2025.02.19 or newer.

originContent: If you installed yt-dlp with pip, use the pip command above.
translatedContent: If you installed yt-dlp with pip, use the pip command above.

originContent: If you installed yt-dlp with pipx,
translatedContent: If you installed yt-dlp with pipx,

originContent: use pipx inject yt-dlp yt-dlp-rajiko to install the plugin in yt-dlp's environment.
translatedContent: use pipx inject yt-dlp yt-dlp-rajiko to install the plugin in yt-dlp's environment.

originContent: If you installed with the .exe/binary or any other method,
translatedContent: If you installed with the .exe/binary or any other method,

originContent: download the bundle and place it in one of these locations:
translatedContent: download the bundle and place it in one of these locations:

originContent: <ul>
translatedContent: <ul>

originContent: • %appdata%\yt-dlp\plugins\ (on Windows)
translatedContent: • %appdata%\yt-dlp\plugins\ (on Windows)

originContent: • ~/.config/yt-dlp/plugins/ (on Linux and Mac)
translatedContent: • ~/.config/yt-dlp/plugins/ (on Linux and Mac)

originContent: • a yt-dlp-plugins folder next to your yt-dlp.exe (like this)
translatedContent: • a yt-dlp-plugins folder next to your yt-dlp.exe (like this)

originContent: • anywhere else listed in the yt-dlp documentation.
translatedContent: • anywhere else listed in the yt-dlp documentation.

originContent: You'll have to create those folders if they don't already exist.
translatedContent: You'll have to create those folders if they don't already exist.

originContent: There is no need to extract the zip file.
translatedContent: There is no need to extract the zip file.

originContent: You can check you've installed correctly by running yt-dlp -v and looking for the [debug] Extractor Plugins: or [debug] Plugin directories: lines. (like this)
translatedContent: You can check you've installed correctly by running yt-dlp -v and looking for the [debug] Extractor Plugins: or [debug] Plugin directories: lines. (like this)

originContent: More information about yt-dlp plugins is available from [yt-dlp's documentation](https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp#plugins).
translatedContent: More information about yt-dlp plugins is available from [yt-dlp's documentation](https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp#plugins).

originContent: ## More info
translatedContent: ## More info

originContent: [Please see the website for more information](https://427738.xyz/yt-dlp-rajiko/) (usage, contact methods, etc)
translatedContent: [Please see the website for more information](https://427738.xyz/yt-dlp-rajiko/) (usage, contact methods, etc)

originContent: ## about this repository
translatedContent: ## about this repository

originContent: this is just where the source code and bug tracker live. most of the info is on the website.
translatedContent: this is just where the source code and bug tracker live. most of the info is on the website.

originContent: Generally you should use the release versions.
translatedContent: Generally you should use the release versions.

originContent: `master` branch usually works, but should be considered experimental and may have bugs
translatedContent: `master` branch usually works, but should be considered experimental and may have bugs
